_comment: Pedersen et al. PRL 120, 165501 (2018) — Kob-Andersen binary LJ smoke + small production. N=1000 (800 A + 200 B), ρ=1.2 isochore, T0 ∈ {0.7, 1.0, 1.3} bracketing the paper Tm=1.028(3). Switched from baoab_drag to baoab_langevin (Wiener-noise FD-balanced thermostat) so MSD grows linearly past the cage timescale and T_meas tracks T_target. NPT coexistence-line (Fig.1) is still out of scope; we target partial RDF structure and proper Einstein-regime MSD at all 3 T.
_paper_ref: Pedersen et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 120, 165501 (2018)

campaign.notes: below paper Tm=1.028 — supercooled regime; FD-balanced thermostat now keeps T at 0.7
at paper Tm=1.028 — coexistence point in Fig.1; FD-balanced thermostat at T=1.0
above paper Tm — equilibrium liquid; FD-balanced thermostat at T=1.3

aggregation.title: Pedersen KA-LJ campaign — N=1000, ρ=1.2, T={0.7,1.0,1.3}
